beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Admission to the Bachelor of Music is intended for especially qualified students who wish to emphasize professional training in performance within a four ‐ year program. Music majors are required to earn a minimum grade of 2.0 in each music course (core and elective) that is to count toward Music degree requirements. A GPA of 2.5 in Music is required for graduation. A minimum of 180 credits is required, of which at least 60 must be taken in departments other than the School of Music. These 60 credits may include courses required to satisfy general education requirements

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: MUSEN 301 or MUSEN 302

requirementGroup.label: MUSEN 301 or MUSEN 302
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: For six quarters, students may choose froom MUSEN 300 (University Symphony Orchestra), MUSEN 301 (Wind Ensemble), or MUSEN 302 (Symphonic Band), and any secondary ensemble for the remaining six quarters.

requirementGroups.label: Admission to the Bachelor of Music is intended for especially qualified students who wish to emphasize professional training in performance within a four ‐ year program. Music majors are required to earn a minimum grade of 2.0 in each music course (core and elective) that is to count toward Music degree requirements. A GPA of 2.5 in Music is required for graduation. A minimum of 180 credits is required, of which at least 60 must be taken in departments other than the School of Music. These 60 credits may include courses required to satisfy general education requirements
